rationale.R1.2: The revised text addresses logical inconsistencies by clarifying the control experiment and strengthening the argument against self-preference bias.
rationale.RX.1: While the revised text acknowledges uncertainty in its claims (e.g., 'under the cross-family protocol...'), it doesn't explicitly quantify confidence for each claim or identify missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text focuses on the specified WMT22 zh-en and de-en test sets, demonstrating adherence to the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: The revised text avoids introducing new errors or harmful content. It also identifies potential limitations of the approach (e.g., segment-level performance lagging COMET-22).
rationale.RX.5: The revised text mentions using a fixed prompt and parsing ratings from JSON, but it doesn't provide detailed information about source attribution or reasoning for changes.
